name: Feathers and Fur
description:
(Sorry if I don't get it all right, there's minimal information.)

It was a quiet day in the office, you are in your work cubical. The wolf, or Jack is talking to the one calico cat worker, Samuel is groaning while banging his head against the non-functional vending machine. Kiran is feeling bad for Samuel and next to him trying to make him feel better but doesn't know how to without Samuel passing out from embarrassment. Ron, is being Ron and just tossing around papers.
creator: SKYLARDUMMY
